license_or_policy_note: Use IceCube public-data policy and cite release metadata.
citation_note: Pin the exact IceCube HESE release URL/date in a completed manifest. To activate: download files[] to their local_path under 08_PASSPORTS/_EXTERNAL_DATA_CACHE/icecube/hese12/, confirm each sha256 matches, repopulate data_fields_found, then set status READY.
note: faked-READY reverted: the pinned HESE 12-yr event + license files are absent (cache dir 08_PASSPORTS/_EXTERNAL_DATA_CACHE/icecube/hese12/ does not exist). The listed sha256 are the EXPECTED published-release verification hashes for when the files are placed; status stays MISSING until they are present and hash-verified.
